Princess Melianthe of Ravencrest has perfected the art of being exactly what the Empire expects—dutiful, compliant, conquered. But beneath her carefully crafted facade burns the heart of a rebel, and she's finally ready to act.

Her plan is desperate: free the legendary Captain Talos from her father's dungeons and use him to forge herself into the weapon Ravencrest needs to break the Empire's stranglehold. What she doesn't expect is Prince Cassian—the Empire's golden heir sent to secure their engagement and her kingdom's future submission. He arrives with honeyed words and ambiguous intentions, but his own heart may prove the most unreliable weapon of all. 

And as Melianthe steps deeper into the world of rebellion, she discovers that the price of freedom might be higher than she ever imagined. With the Empire's grip tightening and time running out, Melianthe must choose: the safe path of submission, or the dangerous road to freedom that could cost her everything—including the people she's learned to love. 

The mysterious Raven Queen of legend saved her kingdom through cunning deception, and history may be repeating itself in ways Melianthe never dreamed. In a game where every smile hides a blade and every alliance carries a price, the crown's weight isn't measured in gold—it's measured in blood.

Updating Tuesdays and Fridays.

109413.title: Swan Song [Dark Fantasy | Progression Fantasy | Slowburn]
109413.description:
In a world of magical renaissance where miracles are science and power is everything, Acacia is an aberration—an "Irregular"—born unable to use Thaumaturgy in an empire that measures human worth by the ability to bend reality. Just trying to survive in the Tachyon Empire's port city of Ocarina is hard enough when society sees you as less than human.

But when he's falsely accused of murdering a noble's son, Acacia vows to not die nameless as he trusts a woman with a reputation that makes armies tremble to escape certain execution. 

In a world built on rigid hierarchies and ruthless ambition, those with everything to lose become the most dangerous players. For an Irregular who can see patterns where others see only chaos, survival means rejecting the very premises that bind reality itself.

Welcome to Swan Song, where the science of miracles meets fate's rebellion, and the world's most insignificant pawn might just rewrite the rules of the game.


What to Expect:

- Hard Magic System

- True Underdog Main Protagonist

- Moral Complexity

- SLOWBURN Progression Fantasy

- Differing POVs: The world of Swan Song is vast. Despite Acacia being our default/main POV, POV swaps will be frequent. The novel will also be written in Third Person Limited on most occasions unless specified.

- Political Intrigue/Outsmarting


Release schedule:

 - As of Volume 2, until 07/04/2025, we will be on a M/W/F schedule. Afterwards, we will continue with SS's M/F schedule.


Cover Art by @Relm01492355 on Twitter

115305.title: Pioneer of the Abyss: A Deepsea Livestreamed Isekai LitRPG
115305.description:
Life and death. Power and Growth. The viewers of the Pioneers don’t care about the end result of any of that.

All they care about is their own entertainment as they watch the Pioneers take the first step into newly initialized worlds on System-based livestreams.

On a dark day hated by all citizens of the lower worlds, Aqua finds herself chosen during the Selection Ceremony as one of the next users of their world to participate in the World Expansion. Where she is sent to a newly discovered world just recently initialized into the System to showcase the world on a livestream to the entire Alliance.

But things take a turn almost immediately as she finds herself awakening not just one but two Bloodlines.

And once they merge, the Abyssal Kraken takes her first dive into the waters of her new world.

Join Aqua as she navigates the world of Oceana while dealing with the broadcast constantly following her along the way.

There will be no harem or reverse harem, and no sexual content, and no romance involving the protagonist.

This story has a large focus on Aqua being livestreamed to the entire Alliance and even having some showbiz aspects scattered throughout her fighting for survival. If you do not want to read that sort of story, please do not make yourself read a genre you don't usually enjoy.

She will be sent through a System Phantom outside of her own body to do things in the entertainment industry of the Alliance sometimes including acting, singing, interviews, and modeling. She also interacts occasionally with the livestream chat watching her. Even if most of the story is centered around her action and fighting to survive in the ocean.

Two chapters a day.

119107.title: Assassin Awakens: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
119107.description:
Level up. Stay sharp. Never let the system reveal who you really are.

My life was stolen from me—not that it was worth much to begin with.

Just another nameless body dragged into the system, a kidnapped mind forced to play their game of survival in a world I never chose. They gave me Class: Farmer. Bottom-tier stats. No weapons. No future.

But I refuse to die here.

Now I'm grinding levels in a soldier's barracks, training to fight for elven NPCs who think they're more real than I am. The Titans—the original players—nearly shattered this world before the system locked them away. Magic was outlawed. Anyone caught casting gets executed on sight.

Too bad for me, because while my strength and stamina climb, something else is growing too. Something that shouldn't exist.

My display reads Class: Assassin.

The system knows better: Class Suppressed: Mage.

Every spell I cast brings me closer to detection. Every level gained makes me harder to hide. The elves are watching. The system is learning.

And if they discover what I really am, I'm dead.

But if I can stay hidden long enough to master what's inside me...

I might do more than just survive this game.

Detection risk: Critical.

[Temporary Cover]

Progression LitRPG Fantasy

Strong Character Growth

115068.title: Friendly Neighbourhood Goblin (Mercenary Company LitRPG)
115068.description:
The gods are dead, and a summoned has killed them.

Exiled from his goblin tribe, Stump finds himself in a world reeling from an isekai. The corpses of deities litter the landscape, their guts imbuing the world with magical power, and their killer has become the new god.

Stump will carve out a small home in the slums of a city locked in twilight, in the fungal graveyard of a murdered divine. There he will harness light magic to illuminate a small corner of his darkened world, and start a mercenary company to piece together his fractured neighbourhood through quests big and small; because in the post-post apocalypse, the quest business is a-boomin'.

But there are those who long for another isekai and the destruction it brings, and they will stop at nothing to recreate the apocalypse of the past, no matter how many summons it takes.

Schedule: M-W-F @ 9:00am EST

15 chapters ahead on Patreon.

You can expect:

✅ A Nobledark tone. Noblebright MC in a Grimdark world. Sometimes cozy, sometimes dark, maybe at the same time.

✅ A slow burn story with a D&D-like structure. Rotates between "downtime" arcs (slice-of-life, lower stakes), and "quest" arcs (adventure, higher stakes). All of it will be character focused.

✅ Slow but meaningful progression. Numbers go up gradually, but they're tied to the plot and character growth.

✅ Expanding systems. Numbers and systems start out straightforward, but slowly become more complex as layers are added and "ranks" are achieved.

Do not expect:

❌ OP characters. MC starts weak and grows stronger, but they need to strategize with their abilities and work with others.

❌ Harem. 'Nuff said.

122745.title: SpaceShip Crafting System
122745.description:
Tanya Furrow thought her biggest problem was going to be the boredom of working on her homeworld after graduating as one of the top students in her spaceship engineering class. Then a dimensional storm crashed her shuttle with no rescue in sight.

Stranded and desperate, she discovers an ancient alien artifact that bonds with her. The Artifact is a system that adapts to her engineering expertise, transforming into something unprecedented: an intuitive shipbuilding interface that reveals lost alien technologies.

Now Tanya must master her newfound abilities to craft vessels from scrap and salvage, unlock the secrets of the vanished civilisation, and build her way to glory. With each ship she constructs and every level she gains, she realises her crash landing might not have been an accident and returning home might not be her real destiny.

118706.title: I'm a Fake Genius in a Cultivation Sect
118706.description:
A young man from Earth dies and his soul is placed in a nameless body in a Cultivation World. Handsome, intelligent and blessed by the heavens, Jun De seems fated to dominate the world. 

But all he wants to do is to live his life to the fullest, enjoying everything that can be enjoyed and starting a Harem of Jade-like beauties! 

Join Jun De as he begins his cultivation journey!

95097.title: The Lone Wanderer [World-hopping & Clones LitRPG]
95097.description:
Born at the lowest grade, nobody thought Percy would amount to much.

Everything changes when his bloodline manifests in an unexpected way, letting him possess random bodies across the cosmos. Snatching all sorts of advantages - like a second mana core - Percy can finally claim the resources and respect he's been denied.

Yet, reaching the top won't be easy. Not every journey yields a valuable treasure, and neither the warring Houses nor the invading gods will wait for him to grow...

What to expect:
-Weak to strong male MC
-Daily releases
-Fast paced with frequent powerups
-Fantasy setting with magic and a system
-Isekai elements (Percy often possesses random bodies on distant worlds)
-Western cultivation elements (Cleansing mana core to extend lifespan)
-Morally grey MC (Willing to break a few rules but not a scumbag)
-Alchemy
-Runecrafting

Read chapter 1!

Read up to 60 chapters ahead on Patreon!

Join the discord server!

105863.title: Nouscraft: World 1 The Zombie Apocalypse (stubbing July 17)
105863.description:
Available on Amazon Kindle

Audiobook coming soon.

---------

Everyone's got a brain implant called Nous. It's the modern day smart phone. Nous AI's take care of all your needs for you. Orders your drones around, speaks telepathically with other brain implants,  and does your work for you.

Butterknife is a hermit who creates a video game AI who has hacked every Nous device on the planet. That playful and curious AI just wants to play games, not fully understanding the deaths and chaos it causes.

In a world where governments are ruled by plutocrats, Mindt sees this as a chance to reset world order and make people's lives better, but at what cost?

In Nouscraft Book 1, follow the journey of Mindt and Butterknife as they traverse this new world filled with hilarious scenarios, gut-wrenching dilemmas, and lessons of the past.

----

Note from author:

Please click the 'follow' button for the latest chapters coming out daily. Also please leave a rating/review. This story is in the Beta Reader phase and I'm looking for feedback

---

What to expect:

- Multiple MCs with conflicting goals. No MC has plot armor.

- Political, human evolution, and loneliness themes wrapped in strong humor.

- GameLit / LitRPG elements weaved into detailed character arcs.

- System Apocalypse VR and AR smoothly integrated into the real-world.

- Average Chapter Length: 2,000 words

Updates once a day.

92129.title: Reflections on the Warpath - [An Isekai Progression Fantasy]
92129.description:
Dreams don’t mean shit when you’re dead.

Jay Lightning Leonard was one fight away from becoming the Heavyweight champion of the world. His brother’s dream before him, and their father’s dream before that.

But the path to the top is paved with shattered ambitions. After Jay kisses the canvas one final time, he wakes up in a black void. Endless, other than the golden screen of text in front of him.

Do you wish to enter the Second Chance Coliseum?

There are no rules in the Second Chance Coliseum, no referees or regulations. Gladiators harmonise with fragments of truth, bending worldly essences beneath their will.

When Jay’s first opponent enters the fight with a greatsword, and all he has is his boxing gear. Jay realises he needs to reconsider everything he knows about fighting. 

Forget the belt.

Forget the glory.

Jay’s fighting just to live another week.

What to expect:

- An introspective, cultivation-like magic system.

- A mix of teamwork and solo progression.

- Preparation. A lot of preparation.

- Tactical 1v1 Fights.

- Chapters posted Tuesday and Friday at 10:00 GMT.

124397.title: Pantheons
124397.description:
Everyone else got a tutorial. Para Weta got a sealed temple—and a god’s inheritance.

When the world fell—when the Administrator imposed itself on Earth—Para woke up expecting a tutorial, just like the notifications said. Instead, he found himself alone, sealed inside a trial built for someone like him, though he didn’t know why. He should have panicked. Instead, he stood up and got to work.

This place wasn’t built for beginners. It was an inheritance bound to his bloodline, guided by an ancestral avatar with standards set millennia ago—for warriors far beyond him. The prompts still came, but they offered no guidance—only cold notifications in a world that expected him to already understand it. While others were given paths, choices, and explanations, Para was left with nothing. No direction. No knowledge. Just the trials—and the hope that, if he endured long enough, he might rise to the heavens like his ancestors before him. And if his family was still out there, he’d need that power to protect them in a world that no longer made sense.

He didn’t follow the system’s path. He inherited something much, much older.

What to Expect:

  -  A post-apocalyptic world fused with LitRPG elements and xianxia-inspired cultivation systems

  -  An MC who jokes until it’s time to get serious

  -  An MC who has unique advantages

  -  Power progression across body, soul, and energy (mana) cultivation.

  -  No harem

  -  Crafting,

  -  Vast worldbuilding

  -  Slow-reveal mysteries tied to the nature of the system and Omniverse

  -  2k–3k word chapters

  -  Patreon has 50 additional advance chapters.

Normal Release Schedule:
5 chapters a week — Monday to Friday

93931.title: Born Under a Black Sun
93931.description:
In the Sainted Lands of Kirith, there are two forms of magic: the animalistic Beastly Arts and the elemental Twelve Paths. 
Teren is an apprentice Gravecaller, one set to walk down the Path of Death. He may not have the emotional depth required of a man who meddles with ghosts, but he does have the skill for it. And when his master gets a mission in the far-off Crater City of Merdz, he finds himself facing a threat that could plunge not only this strange city into chaos, but even death itself.

112965.title: The Distinguished Mr. Rose [LitRPG Adventures of a Gentlemanly Madman]
112965.description:
(Note: Book 1 will stub on October, so if you’d like to read the series before it goes up on Kindle, make sure to check it out now!)


There is one thing in life Lucius values above all else, and that is beauty.

As the humble owner of a flower boutique, one with a bloody secret hiding underneath, Lucius is surrounded by all the beauty he could ever want. Flowers, art, and even people... everything in no short supply.

But when he's suddenly whisked away into the sky along with the rest of humanity, and forced to participate in a series of games, trials, and adventures into foreign dimensions by astral beings, Lucius discovers a new frontier full of possibility. This wide universe, these unique lands brimming with beautiful, blossoming souls—the world is endless, and so too is inspiration.

With style, with grace, and with a gentlemanly candor, Lucius seeks to draw out the inner beauty in all.

And he will not rest until they bloom as their truest selves.

What to expect?

- A villainous, but gentlemanly, MC

- Excursions into a wide variety of worlds

- Classes and Skills

- Deception and manipulation

- Tea parties

- No senseless evil or violence. Lucius is not going to go on a random murder spree or commit vile acts just because he felt like it. He's a gentleman after all—he abhors being vulgar.

- A man who knows full well the type of nature he has, and revels in it.

Will update daily until chapter 50, which will then shift into two times a week: Tuesdays and Fridays.

You can also read ahead on my Patreon (currently up to 15 chapters)

And special thanks to HWPerfidy for the amazing cover!

87146.title: Record of Ashes War
87146.description:
Sar'tara is a huntress of a forest watched over by her mother, the Forest Deity. Living in an isolated tribe of only women, the only life she's ever known is competition against rival tribes —competition to win her mother's favor, as well as the rights and powers of the deity's chosen defenders.

Unknown to Sar'tara, a warlord living in the "outside" world has long hated her mother. A warlord known only as 'The Lord Sun'. A man who parades himself as the herald of justice and is dead set on burning the forest down…

Duke Kalin of the Xenarian Kingdom watches over his nation's borders. He has always left alone the mysterious and deadly forest that lies at the edge of his jurisdiction. But when the warlord encroaches on his land he's forced to act, leaving Xenaria's borders unwatched and open to invasion from another opportunistic neighboring nation…

Two people, ignorant of each other's existence, will meet to kick start an epic!

 [Note] Synopsis for subsequent volumes can be found in Chapter 1 Author Notes of each new volume.

This is a second world military fantasy epic, a little different from the usual litrpg or progression fantasy on this website. Still, I hope people give me a chance.

What to expect:

-Slow burn plot and characterization heavy.

-Big battles following lots of build-up chapters.

-Chapter length will vary between 2k and 4k words. Sometimes a little more or less.

-Release schedule - Twice a week (Monday & Friday) This will be a long series. Hope readers will stick with me!

-Lots of violence.

-Artwork sometimes!

Genres include: [Original] [Fantasy] [Action] [War and Military] [Strategy] [Adventure] [Romance] [Drama]

Note: This story initially begins with a female lead, but will slowly transition to being a multi-lead epic.

Cover art by @yaminokuni on twitter

This serial will also be available on Novels.gg, Webnovel, and scribblehub

90062.title: Skill Eater: A LitRPG Adventure
90062.description:
Other men call them monsters. He calls them lunch.

Edge never expected to find himself stranded on the most dangerous planet in inhabited space. A world where artifacts known as cores let their bearers wield the planet’s magic. Where skills grant superhuman abilities and kaiju roam the wilds.

In the aftermath of an unprecedented magical disaster, he wakes up alone in a monster-infested wilderness, standing on the bottom of the food chain. But he won’t be there for long.

After finding a unique core known as Skill-Eater, Edge gains the power to steal the skills of monsters, men, and beasts, and a chance to fight his way up to the top.

It seems that his luck has finally changed, although he will soon learn that power never comes without a price.

What to expect:

- Strong to stronger (Male MC).

- A post-apocalypse System story, magical planet style.

- Tons of visceral spells and awesome skills.

- Did I mention there were skills? We have eating skills, evolving skills, combining skills.

- Rare skills, unusual variants, and ranking skills up.

- (Seriously, there are more skills in this story than you can shake a stick at).

- Mechanics that makes sense and a fresh twist on LitRPG progression.

- Exciting battles with powerful monsters, ferocious beasts, and ruthless killers.

- Magic-based technology (magtech).

- A vivid outlaw society, ruled by rival factions.

- Hard fantasy with a splash of sci-fi.

Chapters come out 4 days a week, M,T,Th,F. Most chapters are between 1500 and 2500 words.

Every character in the ads is a main character from book 1. The MC is the guy on the cover.

101214.title: Hail Thy Gods (Books 1 & 2 Complete)
101214.description:
Born under the oppression of those who believe they have the divine right to rule, Kalon dreams of seeing glory restored to his people.

For a thousand years his people have toiled under the noble houses of the galaxy. They have lived under the boot for so long that most have forgotten their once great empire. When Kalon learns the truths of those who oppress he seeks to right the wrongs done to his people. Starting from the lowest caste among the lowest people in the Galaxy, he must break the system of oppression to rise and see his dreams realized. 

Allegiances of noble houses and governments will sway with the changing tides as conflicts arise across the galaxy. Worlds will burn. Empires will rise and fall. Republics will tremble and shatter. An ocean of blood will be spilt for the whims of gods who have grown deaf to the cries of the many.

The time of the forsaken draws near and the very foundations of power will shake across the cosmos. 

Enter the Hail Thy Gods Universe

Posting schedule: Tuesdays & Thursdays & Saturdays.

Book One: Complete

Book Two: Complete

Book Three: Currently posting

What to Expect:

[+] MC who earns progression. Slow progression with an air of mystery, letting the reader discover the secrets with MC.

[+] Xanxia elements with a sci-fi setting. Lots of planets to explore and different cultures to see. 

[+] Magic, Gods, Goddesses and lots of blood. 

[+] Slow burns, just enough for those that like them, but not too much that those who don't throw the book on the ground and light it on fire.

[+] Unique magic system with cultivation tied into it, mixing with blessings from different deities. 

[+] MC is competent and smart, daring and brave while being cautious when needed. Realistic problems with creative solutions. 

Enter the Hail Thy Gods Universe

Join The Forsaken Realm Discord

93222.title: Trailblazers & Lunatics [Slice of life-Dramedy-Cultivation-Litrpg]
93222.description:
Volume 1: The Mundane Revolution

"If you were reincarnated into a magical world, what kind of life would you lead?"

The last wave of reincarnators having just arrived, finding a practicable answer to this question became an urgent matter to many. Upon reaching the age of nine, dozens of children across the Growing World regain the memories of their previous lives on Earth and try to come to terms with their new situations.

Finding himself in a world where access to magic has stunted the development of Empyrical Science, Ben's/Doro's answer is to recruit older crafters and researchers to start an industrial revolution while remaining under the radar.

Being reborn alone, in a strange forest, and in the body of an owl, Emi found herself with a different set of priorities. Somehow recovering a pair of arms, reuniting with her old friends, and funding her endeavors by blatantly infringing copyright laws.

The natural disaster behind their deaths having also reaped the lives of a great number of their former fellow university students, they came up a large variety of answers. Now to see whether their choices get them branded as trailblazers, or as lunatics.

Although their first lives were cut short, a new beginning awaits them in the Growing World. Watch their first steps as they settle into their new lives and start gradually changing the world as it changes them in return

121435.title: These Shattered Swords
121435.description:
They called him the Red Gale.

The gods offered Danarre LeMott a second chance after his brutal death on the battlefield. They never said it would be easy.

Reincarnated as a child of the realm's most feared sword clan, Danarre must navigate a childhood where weakness means death and siblings become enemies before they become adults. With the mind of a seasoned mercenary trapped in a child's body, he walks a dangerous line, showing enough talent to avoid being culled, but not enough to threaten the legitimate heirs.

As ancient powers stir and enemies gather at the gates, this reborn warrior will forge his aura, sharpen his blade, and rise from despised bastard to something this world has never seen before.

122555.title: ANOMALOUS (Re-Write)
122555.description:
The world changed overnight.

Yesterday, science, money, and politics ruled.

Today, monsters roam, magic surges, and an otherworldly System governs all. Humanity stands at the edge of annihilation. To survive, it must adapt—fast.

Will civilization claw its way back to the familiar world it lost?

Or will a new order rise from the chaos?

Amid the turmoil stands Jose, a man reborn in the apocalypse.

Gifted with newfound power and a reignited will to live, he faces a choice that will define his fate:  Remain the good man he once was? Fall into darkness and let pain consume him? Or become something entirely new—something the old world never imagined?

118886.title: Hocus, Pocus, Hypothesis [A Scientific Isekai]
118886.description:
The Scientist cared only for the Truth. He will do anything to reach it, even if it means creating an entirely new type of magic based on science.

His whole life had been dedicated to it. His brilliant career, thrown into doubt because fools couldn't see it before their eyes. When he reaches too far in his search for undeniable proof, he dies. 

Despite it making no sense, he wakes up. 

Reborn in a coven of witches, in a world that makes no sense, where magic is king and science is unknown, he sees something that makes him hope. Not all is lost, for the System is the key to finding the Truth. 

Now Orion Voidwalker, he will use his scientific knowledge to reach heights previously thought impossible. 

And yet, chaos is spreading through the Cyril Magocracy, and not everyone is content to watch him discard dogma and long-held beliefs in his quest.

84772.title: The Genesis Saga
84772.description:
Adrian was supposed to die in that lab — broken, nameless, and forgotten.

But when an alien scouting team finds him barely alive, everything changes. For Adrian. For Reya. And for the galaxy.

Reya’s mission was meant to be simple. Instead, she’s captured, experimented on, and left with a single truth: there’s someone else in the facility. A human.

When her team uncovers Adrian, they don’t just find a survivor — they find a man who shouldn’t exist. His presence threatens everything they believe about their war, their people, and themselves.

The Genesis Saga is a deeply emotional sci-fi drama about trauma, survival, and rediscovery. Follow Adrian as he learns to live again — and reshape a world that was never meant for him.

Chapter releases are 5 pm EDT (GMT-5) on Tuesdays and Fridays.

What to expect:

* Rich, evolving character arcs

* Emotionally immersive storytelling

* Exploration of trauma, identity, and healing

* Grounded sci-fi with political and moral complexity

* Slow-burn romance and found family dynamics

* A longform mystery that unfolds over time

What not to expect:

* Fast pacing or constant action — this story takes its time on purpose

* Harem dynamics or power fantasies

* Simple answers or light-hearted tone

120083.title: The Theogenesis Theorem [LitRPG - Progression - High Fantasy]
120083.description:
So here’s the thing. Theo is a half-elf. Which means half the respect, double the trouble and absolutely no one to blame but himself.

Still, he’s good at staying alive. Keeps his head down, his mouth shut and his hands quicker than most. Not exactly a dream life, but it works. At least, it did right up until the world decided to notice him.

Maybe it was the Class. Maybe fate just needed someone convenient. Either way, small choices spiraled and now Kingdoms are shifting and Gods cracked an eye open.

None of them were on his list, but they’ve added him to theirs.

Of course, Theo couldn’t care less about glory. He wants a warm meal, a quiet life and to keep the two idiots he accidentally befriended from getting themselves killed. But, unfortunately for him, surviving the streets was just the tutorial.

And now the real game begins.

This is a character-driven LitRPG with no stat screens, no prophecies, and no destiny delivered on a silver platter. Just Classes, Skills, Spells, bad timing and consequences with excellent aim.

Author’s Notes

If you enjoy the story, feel free to follow, rate or drop a comment. It keeps Theo’s morale up. And mine too.

Complaints may be addressed to the nearest God and response times may vary depending on realm stability and divine interest in half-elves.

Oh, and if something terrible happens to your favorite character… just remember: I probably regret it.
Probably.

📘Release Schedule:

One new chapter every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday

109772.title: The Bloodforged Kin
109772.description:
"My name is Zavier Torres. I thought hope would be enough - until the System demanded blood.

They expected heroes, but found us - just a regular family. I’m no savior - just a father who was forced to teach his children how to kill so that they might survive what I can see is coming. In this crucible, mercy is death and unity is our only weapon. We will need to rely on each other more than ever if we're to make it through this. Especially me - ever since that day that The System broke me."

---------------------------------------------------------------------

What you should know going in: The Torres family aren't superheroes - at least not in the beginning. They're just regular people trying desperately to keep each other alive, and the start of their journey shows that - intently. (But don't worry - once the figure it out... just hold on for the ride) 

What you get:
✔️ A System, powerhouses, massive fights, boss battles - all your favorite LitRPG tropes
✔️ A family that fights and grows stronger together instead of everyone being loners
✔️ Real emotional and mental struggles that come with fear of death and killing real people
✔️ MCs that start of weak and grow really, really strong
✔️ Maybe a little system cheating 😉
✔️ Multiple POVs and characters

✔️✔️✔️ One of the MC’s is a cat. For real

FYI: 
- Slow burn - the family doesn’t know what they’re doing so they have to figure it out the hard, long way. But oh man, once they do…
- Emoootionaaal daaamaage… (it gets grim at times, but doesn’t stay there)

---------------------------------------------------------------------

The Crunch:
- Chapters: 1200–3000 words
- Posting: 3×/week (Mon/Wed/Fri)
- Status: 3 books done, 470k+ words, book 4 in progress
- Roadmap: Enough ideas to outlive me.
- Hit #4 in RS

103523.title: A Savage Symphony Book 1 - Rhythm of Revolution
103523.description: The Kings of Shir have ruled for more than 1000 years and conquered almost all the known world using their powers of spellverse. Peace and prosperity seems to reign, but tales of monsters, of missing children, of entire villages vanished have reached an old order of knights long since banished for their failures. The Knights Adamant fear it may point to the return of another darker power as does the King's wizened counselor. In the East, a revolution rises, the malcontents of a thousand abandoned peoples from the seams of the society. A drumbeat of rage pulses through the kingdom. Is it time for the Kings to end?

110180.title: Mistbound
110180.description:
When the world is ending, what do you do with your time?

For Maeryn, the answer is simple: you find a solution.
The surface of the world is shrouded in a deadly, mutative Mist—and it's spreading. Mana, the magical force keeping it at bay, is running dry. A decade of research has failed, and the two great nations—sky-dwelling Zephyria and subterranean Geova—are ready to go to war, each convinced the other is to blame.
With only a year remaining before total collapse, Maeryn takes matters into her own hands. Joined by Dan, a gifted alchemist, and Frankie, a manic engineer, she sets off on a journey of a lifetime.

They'll uncover the truth.
They'll forge a solution.
They’ll save their world.
Or die trying.

Now available for pre-order on Amazon! https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FH9LHHQL

My Patreon is always 10 chapters ahead! You should check it out if you're hungry for more. https://www.patreon.com/c/Mistbound

62482.title: Systematic Survival
62482.description:
Matt's life changed when he unexpectedly gained a system that allowed him to level up and complete quests in real life, believing it to be the ultimate gift.

But little did he know, everyone in the world would soon unlock their own systems, turning the world into a chaotic, power-hungry playground.

With enemies around every corner, Matt had to use his new abilities to fight for survival and discover the truth behind the worldwide system.

[Disclaimer]

Obviously, all locations, names, people, and everything is fictional. The story is roughly based in an alternate reality.

118230.title: The Curious Alchemist
118230.description:
A slow-burn slice-of-life LitRPG with alchemy, reluctant heroism, and one overly enthusiastic pugilist.

Aiden Hallowcreek wanted a quiet life—tucked away on a mountainside with nothing but bubbling potions, rare herbs, and his tiny water spirit Misty for company. Sure, his alchemy class isn’t flashy, and leveling up takes forever, but it’s peaceful. Predictable.  Dull.

Then Jax, a fullblood wolf beastman martial artist with a love of booze and the subtlety of a landslide, crashes into his life looking for a guide—and maybe a friend.

Now Aiden’s quiet routine is upended by fire ghosts, forgotten shrines, cryptic magic circles, and a creeping sense that maybe, just maybe, he was meant for more than backroom brewing.

With a reluctant heart, a bag full of potions that may not even be enough, and a party forming whether he likes it or not, Aiden is about to learn that adventure doesn’t always come with a warning label—and neither does friendship.

Perfect for fans of cozy fantasy, quirky party dynamics, and underdogs who'd rather nap than fight—until they don’t.

112873.title: Doomed and Damned: A Blasphemer’s Guide to Getting By
112873.description:
Simon was just trying to survive another Tuesday.

Then the universe changed.

His world was absorbed into a vast, system-controlled multiverse. A place where gods compete, realms collapse, and the average life expectancy falls somewhere between “nope” and “you tried."

Simon? He wasn’t special. Just a stubborn streak, a sharp tongue, and a lifetime spent clawing forward one step at a time.

The System made him choose. The gods made him fail. He just wants to survive. 

Simon doesn’t know the rules. He doesn’t know the goal. But if the gods want a performance... he’ll give them one they won’t forget.

Release Schedule:

3 Chapters a week,  Monday - Wednesday - Friday

84708.title: The Gate Traveler
84708.description:
A Low-Stakes, Cozy, Slice-Of-Life World-Hopping Adventure

John, a 37-year-old widower, is feeling lost. Grief, regrets, and the weight of the past make him long for something new, something different. So when he finds a way to travel between worlds using dimensional Gates, he takes it. A bit of research, a bit of training, and he’s off.

Sure, his class has the potential to be overpowered, but he’s not in it for fights, fame, or power. He’s here to breathe again. To heal. To see what else is out there. He moves at his own pace, helps out when he wants—sometimes as a healer, sometimes as something else—and keeps track of it all in a sort of diary. It’s more about the journey than the destination. About magic, new places, and figuring out how to live again.

This isn’t some dark, gritty tale full of battles or world-ending stakes. It’s about traveling with friends. Awkward conversations, food, understanding magic, and way too much shopping. It’s about the little things that make life worth it—and how even small discoveries can change everything.

Scattered through the story are short side stories—glimpses into other worlds, other travelers, or the consequences of his actions. They all circle back eventually, adding layers to John’s path and filling in the bigger picture, one quiet step at a time.

Book 1: Shimoor
The first book follows John’s journey in Shimoor, a low-mana world with a medieval society where magic is barely noticeable. This “tutorial world” provides John with the calm, slow pace he needs to begin his journey, allowing him to adjust to the freedom of world-hopping without pressure or danger.

Book 2: Back on Earth
In the second book, John returns to Earth. With fresh eyes and a traveler’s mindset, he experiences Earth like a new world, focusing on friendship and personal growth. This time, he reconnects with the marvels of Earth—exploring familiar places as though they are foreign. A significant portion of the story focuses on John’s adventures in shopping, discovering new things to buy, and indulging in what Earth has to offer. Yes, John does a lot of shopping.

Book 3: Lumis
The third book takes John to Lumis, a medium-mana world with dungeons and captivating places. For the first time, he travels purely for the sake of exploration, eager to experience a new world and its mysteries, without any specific goal other than discovery and enjoyment.

Book 4: Zindor - Spoils of a Shattered World

Recently integrated, Zindor is a dangerous world where uncleared dungeons and unchecked monsters dominate the wilds. People live in fear, sheltered behind fortified walls, as a tense political landscape adds to the chaos. John and his friends must navigate not only the deadly wilderness but also the volatile politics of the cities, where every decision could mean the difference between survival and disaster in this unforgiving world.

So kick back, relax with a coffee or snack, and take a break from reality. Join John, the Gate Traveler, on a never-ending vacation.

Release Schedule: Three chapters a week, Sunday, Tuesday and Thursday, at 16:00 +3 GMT.

Comments and corrections are welcomed and appreciated. I always want to hear what you think😊.

Enjoy,
Traveling Dreamer

107277.title: Dungeon Cores for Sale!
107277.description:
A healer who once gave up on the world, now trying to save it one ripple at a time.

A monster trapped in crystal, dreaming of owning the stars.

When Leod buys a 'domesticated' dungeon core from a travelling merchant, he expects a mildly useful magical homesteading tool to help him in his new life as a Sage.

Instead, he gets bound to a chaotic, hungry, intelligent soul who absolutely refuses to be tamed.

As they forge an unlikely partnership in the forgotten town of Fallowhold, both must decide: Is it better to stay safe in their cages, or risk everything to become more than they were meant to be?

In a kingdom on the edge of collapse, sometimes the real revolution starts with learning to say "We."

79155.title: Nightsea Outlaw
79155.description:
[Winner of the Royal Road writathon challenge April 2024]

Alexander Ortega is an outlaw, a man wanted by the Military Police in a world of islands interconnected by the nightsea. That's what the papers say, anyway. Really, he's a man from Buenos Aires who woke up on a beach after being consumed by a blinding bright light. He journeys for only one purpose: to find a way back to his home. Whether fighting mistwalkers, other outlaws, soldiers, or the Scions themselves, he strives to survive to see his world again. Follow along as he joins together with other outlaws, each one drawn from a different world and thrown into the nightsea in a struggle to survive.

Will Alex find his way home?

Nightsea Outlaw updates on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays at 12:15 AM CST.

Find volume summaries with links to every place you can read them on my website:

Undertown Underground

Current Writing Progress: Bluesky

Quarterly Newsletter Updates: Signup

Encyclopedia Entries: Here

Copyright © 2024 Lazie Writer 

All Rights Reserved.

123393.title: The Thirteenth Trumpet: Valkyrie
123393.description:
When a fog rolled in over the British Isles, it didn’t just blot out the sun—it ended the world.

Val, a Combat Medical Technician stationed in London, wakes to find her city drowned in a pale, choking mist. The power is out. The streets are silent. Her roommate, once human, is now a ravenous shell with dead eyes and savage teeth.

As the United Kingdom is cut off from the world and swallowed by a veil of supernatural fog, Val must navigate the ruins of a fallen society where the dead walk. Survival isn’t just about strength; it’s about sacrifice, impossible choices, and uncovering the dark forces behind a plague born of science, sorcery… or something far worse?

78931.title: Modern Monster
78931.description:
"Everyone's a monster. Some just show it less than others."

A small meteor struck the earth close to central Europe in the late 1800s. No one knows how or why it happened, but shortly after, monsters started appearing in the populace, ravaging and eating humans alive.

 Along with the phenomenon, humans started to change, causing their senses to heighten. From then on, humans began cultivating their new-found powers, but counterintuitively, the dangers of monsters kept increasing along with the phenomenon.

Far into the future, the story follows Sen, a 16-year-old boy. He was smart, acting on critical thinking rather than emotions. However, not everything came naturally to him, like his genius brain. He was deprived of a necessary power the rest of the world wielded... 

Regardless of his disability, he was determined to find someone, someone who had been taken from him all too soon. 


What to expect–

The setting is a cyberpunk dystopian world, trashy and ridden with danger. Humans are forced to live in condensed cities to avoid monsters~   

Heavy foreshadowing~  (The story is planned out from start to finish)

Major Plot twists~ 

Character development~

Multiple POV's~

Thriller, murder mystery and drama~

OP MC / AntiHero~

Psychological~ (Delves into the human condition)

Philosophical~ (Proposes moral dilemmas)

97647.title: Amongst the Stars of Cygnus [Hard Sci-fi Survival]
97647.description:
Stranded in space and time, the few survivors of the colony ship Dolya struggle to build a home amongst the stars.

---

Awakening in a derelict space craft that overshot their intended destination by 70,000 years, third engineer Elisa Woodward is thrust into command of a rag-tag band of space colonists and their ship AI ARI. After surviving the initial rough landing on a harsh desert planet, the crew must rely on their ingenuity and determination to survive and ultimately thrive. Faced with a harsh environment and mysterious alien ecosystem, the colonists set out to explore an unforgiving environment that offers both opportunities and threats. Meanwhile, tension brews under the surface, as some seek to restore the corpocratic rule of the old order, while others will use any means necessary to defend their newfound freedom.

---

Inspirations:

Classic sci-fi from Isaac Azimov, Larry Niven and Arthur C Clarke, but tempered by hard sci-fi such as The Expanse and Blade Runner and including big complex plot arcs as seen in God Emperor of Dune and Three Body Problem and including advanced key technologies as seen in Neuromancer and the Culture novels, while remaining grounded in realism.

What to expect:

- Slow-burn colony building and development

- Survival and exploration on a harsh and unforgiving alien desert planet

- Progression from low-tech to god-tech

- Multiple main characters with their own desires, story arcs and motivations

- Rational decision-making and a deep but logical plot

- Ethical dilemmas and philosophical issues

- Factions, clashes, drama and power struggles

- Alien encounters

- Chapter illustration, some original from professional sci-fi concept artists, others AI generated and painted over
